🔗 Backend Connection

Point this dashboard to your backend server. Leave blank if the frontend is served directly by the backend (same origin).

AI Mode
✅

Bot is Live

Your WhatsApp bot is online and accepting commands.

📷 Scan QR Code
⚡ QR is live — scan it NOW before it expires
Expires in: 60s — auto-refreshes when expired

WhatsApp → ⋮ menu → Linked Devices → Link a Device → scan

can't scan? use phone number pairing below — it's easier on mobile
Connect Bot to WhatsApp
1

Get a number ready

Your bot needs its own WhatsApp number — a second SIM, virtual number, or any number that has WhatsApp installed. This is the number the bot will use to send and receive messages.

2

Enter the bot's phone number

Include country code, digits only. Example: 2349012345678 for a Nigerian number.

3

Enter the code in WhatsApp

After you click "Get Pairing Code", an 8-digit code will appear below. Open WhatsApp on the bot's phone and enter it.

Your pairing code — valid for ~60 seconds
—
1. Open WhatsApp on the bot's phone
2. Tap ⋮ (menu) → Linked Devices
3. Tap Link a Device
4. Tap "Link with phone number instead"
5. Enter the code above exactly as shown
6. Done — bot is now live ✅

Once linked, the bot runs independently. You don't need the phone nearby — it handles everything on its own.

or scan QR code above if available
📣 Auto-Message Campaign
👥 Contacts
🚀 Send
📝 Templates
📊 Progress
📁

Click to upload or drag & drop

Accepts .csv · .txt · .vcf (phone contacts export)

CSV format: Name, Number — one per line

or paste manually

Use {name} in your message — the bot replaces it with each person's name.

📢 Create WhatsApp Group from Contacts

Creates a WhatsApp group with all your saved contacts instantly. Max 256 members.

Write the message below or pick a saved template. Use {name} for personalisation.

🛡 Account-safe mode: Verifies each number is on WhatsApp before sending, simulates typing, sends in random batches of 2–4 with 30–90s gaps, then a 3–6 min cooldown. Hard cap: 1,000 msgs/day.

Save reusable message templates. Click Use to load into the campaign editor.

Save New Template

⏸ Cooldown active — waiting s before next batch to protect your WhatsApp account.
No campaign run yet.
Session Control

Logout wipes the current session. You'll need to re-pair with WhatsApp after.
